reviews.name: places/ChIJ5WfERvu55BQR_417dHvWP10/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOeVEwTldNVnBCTVhab2MxVTFVMk53TFVOTFIzYxAB
reviews.text:
Anyone who even thinks of working with Dr. Koniver should be advised up front that he severely violated the principle of “above all do no harm” in his interactions with me.

I consulted with Dr Koniver for a variety of medical issues which he is known to treat with peptides. He subsequently sent me a detailed treatment plan.

A full week later, while I was still waiting to receive his prescriptions for testing and peptides, OUT OF THE BLUE his office manager wrote me a brief email saying that he decided he is not taking me on as a patient!!!!!

This is after he sent me his treatment plan!!

He did not provide ANY explanation at all as to WHY he would do that and he proceeded to AVOID all further correspondence with me.

After discussing my many medical symptoms that could benefit from peptides, he initially gave me hope that working with him would bring me to better health. Then ALL OF A SUDDEN he DROPPED me.  ZERO accountability or apology for how he mishandled this situation.

I wanted an explanation as to why he did a 180 but he continued to not respond to my calls or emails at all.

I wanted him to know that he had mistreated me, robbed me of hope, and left me very confused as to why a doctor who said he would help me suddenly ghosted me.

His conduct is beyond UNPROFESSIONAL and I would hate for someone else to go through what I did.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ5WfERvu55BQR_417dHvWP10/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmblBIeXlRRRAB
reviews.text: The person I spoke to during the consultation was nice. I tried the subq NAD and didn’t notice a change so I switched to their FLOW peptide. I’m on my second month and have maybe (not sure) noticed an improvement in sleep. My plan was to keep using it for one more month then do my fill up up but I got an email this week that going forward, everyone has to pay monthly membership fees. The lowest tier is $250 a month. So now I’d be paying $250 for the privilege of spending $625 on their peptide. I understand their must be people who reach out with lots of questions, that take up time and resources but their should be an option for the people who don’t. Who just want to use the product. You can’t say you’re in it to help people when you do something like that.

reviews.text: Can’t say enough great things about The Wellness Loft! Over a year ago, I was having some medical issues and was not pleased with the care from several doctors I had seen. Their answer was to put me on medicine for the symptoms, rather than figure out the root cause of the issues. Not only was I experiencing these issues but I wasn’t getting better and didn’t feel heard. I found the Wellness Loft and after my initial appointment with Dr. Kimbi, I finally had hope! Their approach to care is unlike any medical experience I’ve had — thorough, personalized, and deeply attentive. They genuinely care about my overall wellness and thanks to them I now have an understanding of the issues I was facing and feel so much better!! Dr. Kimbi, Dr. Lyndsey, Morgan, Erin and the entire staff are amazing! I recommend them to everyone I can. If you’re looking for a functional medicine practice look no further. I’m so grateful for the care I’ve received. Thank you all! You guys are the best.

reviews.name: places/ChIJOX9BCmx7YmARc0Wy3chJ_zM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25FeGRXUTBVeTFaUVVkUFpqVlpjREpIWjBGek9GRRAB
reviews.text: I truly couldn’t have better things to say about The Wellness Loft. I discovered them about five months ago while searching for a local functional medicine doctor (hard to find!), and my husband and I have been seeing them ever since. What I love most is that while there are specialized practitioners across different disciplines, they all stay closely connected, which creates real continuity of care. It truly feels like a one-stop shop—I get everything from bloodwork to supplements to facials here, and their office is beautiful, a joy to visit! Everyone is so incredibly kind, warm, and welcoming, and you can genuinely feel how invested they are in their patients. Dr. Kimbi has given me such peace of mind, knowing I’m doing everything I can to support my health and longevity. We say all the time how lucky we are to have found them—especially so close to home!

reviews.text:

reviews.text: Dr. Karegar listened to what was going on with my health for 30mins.  After I was done explaining how I was feeling.  She said oh you been over weight all your life.  PA aren’t drs and they shouldn’t be prescribing medication.  I’m the dr I went to medical school for a long time. I know better.  PA’s only go to school for 2 years.  They don’t know.  I asked her to run some thyroid labs and labs for my adrenal function.  She said she was the dr and she will run labs that she see fit.  Obviously she didn’t read my chart because I was referred to the office for a cortisol challenge.  She also said to me she can tell I’m healthy just be looking at me and she really didn’t need to do labs.  Well thanks for nothing Dr.  Glad you went to medical school for a long time.  You need to work on how you talk to your patients and fyi I’m still not feeling well. Patients can look well and still be sick.  Don’t waste your money on seeing this Dr. Keep looking for a compassionate Dr that will help you find out what’s wrong with you. 😢

reviews.name: places/ChIJV5OEd0Sl-IgRjVwNKC83nSw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwbnN6ZFNnEAE
reviews.text: I was referred to this practice by my family doctor at the time for Graves Disease. Dr. Brennan was my physician and remained so until I left. The wait time was ALWAYS anywhere from 15-40 minutes after my appointment was scheduled for. If you needed to get in touch with the billing department, you could leave them many messages and most of them will not be returned. His medical assistant Angela was always wonderful and pleasant to deal with. I recall the ladies at the reception counter frequently speaking about other employees in ill regard as well as patient interactions on many occasions while I waited in the lobby. I left ultimately because I felt as if my concerns as a patient were not being heard. There were many times when I would mention things that ran in my family history (such as Thyroid Storm), that I became concerned about that were dismissed as if they weren't relevant to my treatment plan. After being informed my levels were significantly lower than they should be (which was routinely the case every six months or so after my oblation), I was asked if I was "taking my medication correctly". Once I explained how I knew that my medication was being taken each day, I was informed that he would not fill my prescription to what he "thought I needed" until we could rule out that it wasn't my error causing the deficiency in my levels. I was a patient of his since early 2017 and clearly never had any issues taking prescribed medication from him before. This was the last straw of many months to a year of frustration, countless pointless visits and running in circles. I am currently seeing another doctor with a different practice who had no issue testing my levels and correcting the dosage of my medication. I would recommend doing your research before becoming a patient with any practice and always trust your gut.

reviews.text: So far I have met with Casey and Meghan and they have both been excellent! I was overwhelmed starting this process but all 3 of my first appointments were done in such a way that made it all manageable. I am looking forward to the next 6+ months working this amazing team and getting my health back on track. I have hasimotos autoimmune and the flare ups have been unreal. I knew something wasn't working for me and that I needed help.  I know these ladies will help me get on a much better path.  Just for some background, this is not my first rodeo and I've seen many functional doctors, chiropractors, integrative med professionals, etc. over the years so I'm familiar with supplements, etc. I live a healthy lifestyle but the amount of information i've already received from Meghan on food and nutrition along with the supplements Casey has started me on, has been worth it already.   You won't regret seeing this amazing team of practitioners!

reviews.text: My wife and I made a commitment to improve our health in early 2025 and decided to use the Functional Health Center as our base to understand where we were health wise.  We didn’t understand what a great decision this was until we started working with Chelsey and her team.  Chelsey was able to diagnose our health issues and we worked through her process to transform our health in 8 months.  I’m feeling better now than I did 15 years ago and I’m truly grateful for their support.  I would suggest anyone to use their services if they want to make a life changing improvement.

reviews.name: places/ChIJba4_0EGFVogRB35osyRVnIA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5SWRYZHJNSGxmZEZCQ2JFeFFYM2g2ZEUxUWMwRRAB
reviews.text: My husband & I decided to make 2025 the year we focused on our health. Working with Chelsey at Functional Health Center has been life changing. After having thorough bloodwork & hormonal testing I was able to have a better understanding of what was going on with my body. I struggled to lose any weight at all for the past 3 years. In the past few months I’m now down 18lbs & counting & feel better than I have in years. I suffered with hip pain that I thought I would just have to live with. I’m now pain free.  Chelsey addresses all my concerns and has made such a difference in my health . I know the changes we’ve made will pay long term dividends with the quality and quantity of our lives. I encourage everyone to take a look at Functional Health and see how they can help you get to and fix the root cause of your health issues.

reviews.text:
At 46, perimenopause hit me harder than I ever expected. The brain fog, emotional swings, sleep disruption, bloating, and just not feeling like myself anymore… it was overwhelming. I finally decided to give HRT a chance, and choosing Biltmore Restorative was one of the best decisions I’ve made for my health.

It has truly changed my life in every realm… mentally, physically, emotionally, and even relationally. I feel clear again. Strong again. Balanced again. Like me again.

What sets Biltmore Restorative apart isn’t just the results… it’s the customer service. Their team is unbelievably on point. They listen. They respond quickly. They care. I have never felt dismissed or rushed. Every question is taken seriously, and they make you feel supported through the entire process.

If you’re struggling with perimenopause or hormone imbalance and wondering if you just have to “push through it,” you don’t. There are answers. There is help. And this team delivers it with professionalism and compassion.

I am beyond grateful.

reviews.text:
**5 Stars – Amazing Experience at Biltmore Restorative!**

I had the pleasure of visiting Biltmore Restorative Greenville recently, and I am absolutely thrilled with my results! Abby’s expertise with dermal fillers is top-notch—she really takes the time to listen to your concerns and helps tailor a treatment plan that delivers fantastic, natural-looking results. I was amazed at how subtle yet effective the filler treatments were, enhancing my features without looking overdone.

Additionally, I tried their peel for skin tightening and to address fine lines, and WOW. I could see a noticeable difference in the smoothness and texture of my skin right after the treatment. It was like an instant refresh! My skin feels firmer, and the fine lines have definitely softened.

The entire experience was enhanced by the warm, welcoming reception staff. Allison made me feel right at home from the moment I walked in, and her professionalism was evident throughout the visit. Plus, the aftercare instructions were clear and thorough, which really helped me feel confident as I healed.

I can’t recommend Abby and the entire Biltmore team enough. They truly know how to make you feel and look your best!

reviews.name: places/ChIJaey4ZAInWIgR6oYOFLUWSvE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGd1pibnFRRRAB
reviews.text: We stumbled upon New Life Center while researching options for brain injury treatments based on the research documented in Norman Doidge’s books. In our case, conventional medicine had no more to offer. There are so many treatment options out there no one is talking about; fortunately there are pioneers like Dr. Elliot paving the way with a newer branch of functional medicine that offers some of them. The treatment, while varied by individual, addresses issues at root cause and tackles them with a holistic approach that conventional medicine doesn’t bother with. Yes, what you eat and what you clean with matters greatly, and blood biomarkers and brain maps tell a much deeper story than you’ll ever hear from your PCP, who must work within a rigid framework of insurance companies. Your body can do great things if you give it a chance. Under Dr. Elliot and his team’s care, we made substantial progress and considerably stepped up our routine to reduce inflammation and increase the overall well-being, with several positive outcomes. You only have one life, and New Life can help you make it the best it can be.

I cannot even imagine how much I would be paying for an entire year of their services. Just know that before you commit to this place, you better have some very deep pockets.

reviews.text:
After months of feeling off—constant fatigue, weight gain despite diet and exercise, mood swings, and poor sleep—I finally decided to seek help from HRT-MD. From the moment I called the clinic I felt heard, understood, and truly cared for.
The process began with a comprehensive consultation. The staff took the time to get a detailed history, listen to my symptoms, and answer all of my questions. They weren’t just trying to “sell” me something; they were focused on getting to the root of my concerns.
I underwent thorough lab testing—far more detailed than what my primary care physician had ever ordered. The results showed that my testosterone and progesterone levels were significantly low, and I was also estrogen-dominant. I finally had an explanation for the symptoms I had been struggling with for years.
They customized a treatment plan tailored specifically to my needs.
Within a few weeks, I began to feel a difference. My energy returned. My sleep improved. I started shedding stubborn weight, and most importantly—my mood and mental clarity came back. I felt like myself again for the first time in years.
What sets this clinic apart is their ongoing support.I feel supported every step of the way. I was never just a “number” here.
The team at HRT-MD is knowledgeable, kind, and truly invested in your wellbeing. Every appointment feels like visiting people who genuinely want to see you thrive. I’m so thankful I found this place—it has changed my life for the better.

reviews.text: We have been seeing Chris Jackman for a year and half now. My daughter was diagnosed with Lymes disease 2 years ago and it drastically changes our world. Lymes is an extremely complex disease and requires a level of expertise that is fine tuned and patient specific. Chris does an incredible job of taking the time to truly listen to my daughter’s symptoms and taking those complaints as a way of guiding him to the right treatment options.  Chris does an incredible amount of research and has made it his priority to be informed about the latest findings and resources to best serve his patients, allowing families to remain hopeful despite the ups and downs and ongoing challenges Lymes Disease continue to present. As Lymes Disease has recently gained new awareness I have no doubt that Chris will be among the leading practitioners paving the way to support new research, funding, and treatments as he cares deeply for his patients and all they’ve had to endure. Not only does he support and recommend use of some traditional medicine, he also uses many natural remedies to enhance treatments. His own family has also been known to use the same in supporting their own health and care. He’s not only believes what he recommends but he practices it just the same and I appreciate that. If you are on the fence about taking your health into your own hands and tired of looking for answers and a positive change, don’t wait any longer. Investing isn’t wasted, it will give you and your loved ones life back. We will be forever grateful for Chris and Dr Saleeby at a Carolina Holistic Medicine.

reviews.text:
I first went to Charleston Hormone a few years ago (whenever they were in their previous location).

At the time, I took a blood test and trusted what was being told to me in the session that followed; which didn't give me the most thorough information.

Due to that, I didn't understand the severity of my blood work at the time and ended up venturing off into what else was going on, which led me back to needing a hormone panel.

Now, in their new location, I came back to Charleston Hormone hoping to be seen and heard after also having gathered my own information over time; I was way more educated about hormones than I was before.

Once again, my blood work review wasn't as thorough as my own research. Due to still not feeling well, I called and asked to try different dosages of the medications that were given to me and instead, I ended up paying over 100.00 for their time, just to be told "no"; which they knew before I arrived for that appointment what their answer was going to be. I felt like I paid for wasted time, more confusion and not being heard; which is an uncomfortable feeling, especially being a woman of color.

Due to my own research/keeping the fight going for myself, my blood work is currently saving my life with perimenopause being a possible answer + finding better help.

If you want to be seen and understood by your hormone specialist and are a person of color especially, do not go to Charleston Hormone for help.

reviews.text:
An Unmatched Level of Care and a Life-Changing Decision

Sending my first email to Charleston Men's Clinic was one of the best decisions I have ever made. Given my demanding work schedule, finding the time for lengthy phone calls is nearly impossible. I was thrilled to find that the clinic was highly receptive to my initial outreach via email, making it incredibly easy to work out scheduling details. To this day, the vast majority of my communication outside of visits is handled through email, which is a convenience I truly appreciate and prefer.

All of my interactions with the staff have been remarkably positive. While there may be cheaper places to get testosterone treatment, I simply cannot imagine that anywhere else provides the level of personalized service and attention that I receive here.

My first visit with Dr. Markovitz was a phenomenal consultation that lasted well over an hour. He took the time to explain my blood tests in depth and walked me through all my available options. To my genuine surprise, he recommended the least expensive option and did not try to sell me on any "extras." I have been a patient for well over a year now, and I have never once felt pressured to purchase additional treatments or services.

The true game changer, however, has been working with Stacey. I initially resisted utilizing her help for weight management, and my only regret now is that I didn't start working with her from the beginning. She has successfully helped me to lose over 30 pounds of fat while maintaining my muscle mass.

If you are a man over 30 and you are feeling anything less than your best, I highly recommend you reach out to these folks. I’m over 40, and thanks to the team at Charleston Men's Clinic, this is the best I have felt in more than 10 years.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6yu-4rxx_ogR8hmRfOD-jlU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2aE8tVVZBEAE
reviews.text:
Unfortunately, my experience with Dr. Lori was deeply disappointing and unprofessional. When I began experiencing significant side effects from the treatment she prescribed (debilitating anxiety and intense random cramping) I called to share my concerns. Rather than listening or offering thoughtful guidance, she dismissed me, telling me to "keep using it and start a journal" before abruptly hanging up. I was pretty in shock, and decided to lower my dosage in the hopes of lessening the side effects.

A few weeks later, I called again, emphasizing how terrible I was feeling—especially since HRT was the only recent change to my medications. Once again, she dismissed me, insisting there was "no way" it could be the cause and seemed annoyed that I was reaching out. At that point, I decided to stop the treatment on my own, and within a few days, I started feeling significantly better.

After I had already decided I would find a different doctor, she randomly called me back out of the blue. She said, "Oh, I was looking at your chart from a few weeks ago, and yeah, you should stop taking the HRT, okay?" and then hung up. It felt like a weak attempt to cover herself rather than genuine care or concern.

I deeply regret not starting with a different doctor who had far better recommendations. My hope is that by sharing this review, I can help steer women toward a doctor who will actually listen, care, and collaborate with them on their health journey. It's 2024, we deserve doctors who listen to us and believe when we tell them we aren't feeling well.

reviews.name: places/ChIJDeNjbDl6_ogRhC-odwVX9oY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25kRVgwbFRhMTlPTVRCRVozWkVjbk0xUkdkUVMxRRAB
reviews.text:
​As a first-time client on the cusp of turning 50, I couldn't be more impressed with The Men's Center & the exceptional care led by Dr. Denny Kubinski & his incredible staff. This isn't just a health clinic, it's a dedicated center focused entirely on helping men feel & be their absolute best.
​​The direct-pay model is truly the defining feature here & it completely transforms the patient experience. The appointments are unrushed—I felt genuinely heard, & Dr. Kubinski took the time to conduct a thorough analysis & explain my specific health needs. This is the kind of personal attention that is impossible to find in a typical volume-based practice. The convenience of immediate medication dispensing on-site is another major benefit that makes the entire process incredibly efficient.
​​If you are a man, particularly one entering or navigating your 40s and 50s, who is serious about optimizing your health, energy & vitality, I cannot recommend The Men's Center enough. This center has given me a focused path to truly feeling & being the best me & I am excited about the results to come.

reviews.name: places/ChIJDeNjbDl6_ogRhC-odwVX9oY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1TU1tUXdSMWhSZUdkMldqTnhNbFZCV0ZkRVgwRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Kubinski has been an incredible source of guidance and support for me over the past year as I’ve navigated treatment decisions for my recurring prostate cancer. Even though I live in California and our conversations have been over the phone, he has always made me feel heard, understood, and never rushed. Dr. Kubinski combines deep medical knowledge with true compassion, which has meant more to me than I can express during a very challenging time. I’m truly grateful for his care and highly recommend Dr. Kubinski and The Men’s Center to anyone seeking thoughtful, trustworthy guidance for any urinary or prostate concerns.

reviews.name: places/ChIJDeNjbDl6_ogRhC-odwVX9oY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWd1kyTldTaTEyUWxwaVFXUm5VbUpIZUd4eFoxRRAB
reviews.text: Just did my initial consult with Dr. Kubinski at The Men's Center. I was really happy with the extra care and time he took to speak with me about my unique situation. I'll be back! Thanks, guys!

I'm 65, I've seen a lot of Doctors throughout my time. I must say, I had lost 20 lb before I came to Low country;  I first met Amber with her big friendly smile.
She explained everything about payment plan, and what to expect; I then had blood drawn ! Talk to the doctor ! Then meet with Miss. Sandra and she got down to the nitty gritty ! reviews.text:
I cannot say enough about the success I have had with Low Country Male. In two months I have increased my muscle % by 8.6 and reduced my fat by 6.2.

But even more, Dr. Sandra, Amber, as well as the entire staff, are incredible to work with. TRULY, more than I can express in words.
ABSOLUTELY, the BEST!!!!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJeUal8_A5AIkRqCN0ZYvLMYE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21VNWRVMUxUMEYyTldkS1luWm5ZbU5ZUkcxU1QzYxAB
reviews.text: Low Country Male comes as close as possible to being the 'MAGIC BULLET' to recover from age related and other types of injuries. After 29 years as a member of the Military and 21 years in Law Enforcement (and very active in contact sports), I've had A LOT of injuries resulting in 13 surgeries and my recovery from #13 {L5-S1 Fusion with 4 screws and a spacer} at 65 years old was not progressing at an acceptable rate (for me). I struggled for over a yeaar to recover my place in life. Then I walked intp Low Country Male and Amber thoroughly briefed me on the protocols and what I could expect. Blood test next and a briefing by a medical doctor (from the receptionist, phlebotomist, to the doctor and Amber, everyone has all been great and caring.) My part in this was simple- EXCERCISE.  I am walking extra (especially upstairs 2-3 at a time) and doing Army Style Calisthenics, such as pushups, trunk twisters, and some kettle bell weight curls.  Next week I'll start going to the gym for heavier weight use.  After 2 months my arms look amazing, and I've had to punch an extra hole in my belts and I'm hitting the golf ball at my prelast surgery distance (regaining the 75 yards + I lost). The numbers back up the appearance… I’ve lost 12.5% body fat but gained 16% Skeletal Muscle Mass for a bottom-line gain of 7.2 pounds… my energy level and stamina on the back 9 is improving and YES even my intimate moments have increased.

reviews.text: Great place. I was able to get an appointment the next day. Super friendly staff. I'm feeling better already! If your energy levels are down  I highly recommend Low Country Male!

reviews.name: places/ChIJtSpWKHt1V4gR0ryoZhU8TTk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xORGRtUXdkSFJhVVZvM1VESXdWV0ZMZHkxVlNIYxAB
reviews.text:
I had an absolute bizarre experience about 2 years ago, and I just remembered I did not come on here and leave a review about it. I had been with Lowcountry Male for 2 years. I was with other medical groups receiving TRT when I lived in Atlanta prior to this, but I enjoyed my experience here the most.

I always paid on time, took the program very seriously, and was a solid client for a year and a half to two years. The Greenville location was amazing and I brought untold numbers of new clients to them because I was a walking advertisement after my physical changes and there are benefits to bringing new clients.

Then, I moved to Spartanburg. I was extremely happy to find the Spartanburg location at just opened and I booked the first appointment I could to establish a new relationship with them.

From the minute I walked in it was already kind of weird. The friendliness that was at the Greenville location was just not there. I figured it could be growing pains, so when I'm finally called back I meet what I believe is a female nurse practitioner. We were going over the treatments that I had been undertaking, and I talked to them about how they prescribed me Phentermine at the Greenville location and how effective it was. I told her that my 3 month wait period (you have to take it for 3 months and come off of it for 3 months) had ended and I was eager to return to it because of the benefits it provided.

Her reaction was weird to say the least. She looked at me like something was wrong with me, and didn't say much else for the rest of the appointment. I thought everything was fine and went on with my day.

I then receive a letter in the mail that they are dropping me as a client. They stated that they were concerned that I asked for this medication and they thought I had some kind of problem. Mind you, the Greenville location was the one that told me about this medication, prescribed it to me in the first place, and had been prescribing it for many months after. I followed all of the protocols I was supposed to, waited the 3 months, never asked for extra, never did anything out of the ordinary.

I finally was able to get in contact with the front office at Greenville. I'm not going to say who I spoke with, but they explained to me that the head doctor that runs the place is an absolute nut and does this sometimes. They then actually gave me the name of a better local physician that's much cheaper and is absolutely zero hassle.

I see a lot of positive reviews on here and I would have been one of them, but if it can happen to me, it can happen to any of you.

Be warned.

reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Outstanding First Visit at Gameday Men's Health!
